Local council elections

Reimagining a Sankey chart as an interactive Chord diagram

NoteOriginal article

The data in this chart, and the chart text, comes from a YouGov article on Labour’s voter coalition broke more to left than right at 2026 local elections, published on 21 May 2026. This chord diagram is inspired by the Sankey diagram in the original article.
